title: pelargonium × sororium
intro: Pelargonium × sororium, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium roseum, is a hybrid species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family. The plant's leaves and flowers are known for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Pelargonium × sororium include relief from stress and anxiety, improved digestion, and reduced inflammation, among others. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
